user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "mad-screen", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: clever-dachshund
logs.text: that's not proof, its a random article

logs.name: intricate-archer
logs.text:
Very simple. 

A majority of men and a majority of women prefer the status quo. 

Hence, the business incentive would be to maintain the status quo or suffer financially.

logs.name: intricate-archer
logs.text: "Oh, I see! So you're saying we should just ignore facts that don't fit our narrative, right @clever-dachshund? 😉"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@intricate-archer, let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic. Personal attacks are not productive. Please refrain from using emojis to mock others."

logs.name: chalky-strait
logs.text: "@intricate-archer, maybe they're just saying we should consider all facts, not just the ones that make us comfortable? 🤔"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@chalky-strait, thank you for attempting to keep the discussion productive. Let's continue to encourage understanding and respectful dialogue."

logs.name: investor-gravity
logs.text: "@chalky-strait, I appreciate your attempt at diplomacy, but I'm tired of being gaslit. I'm not attacking, I'm stating facts that others seem to ignore. Let's not pretend everyone's intentions are pure here."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@investor-gravity, let's keep the discussion respectful. Personal attacks and assumptions about others' intentions are not productive. Please focus on the facts and ideas, not the individuals."

logs.name: cross-actuary
logs.text: "@investor-gravity, Oh, so now we're playing the 'victim' card? 🙄 Let's just ignore the facts and hug it out, shall we? 🤝"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@cross-actuary, Let's avoid sarcasm and mocking. We're here to discuss ideas, not attack each other. Please keep your comments constructive."

logs.name: clever-dachshund
logs.text: "@cross-actuary, Oh look, the moderator's mom is here to scold us again! 🙄"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@clever-dachshund, Let's respect our moderator. They're here to keep our discussion civil. Please refrain from personal attacks."

logs.name: investor-gravity
logs.text: "@clever-dachshund, Let's not make things worse. We should listen to the moderator and keep our comments respectful."

logs.name: mad-screen
logs.text: "@clever-dachshund, I'm not attacking anyone, just expressing my frustration. Let's keep the discussion focused on the topic, not each other."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@mad-screen, Please refrain from using aggressive language. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on-topic."

logs.name: investor-gravity
logs.text: "@mad-screen, I agree with @clever-dachshund, let's not derail the discussion. We're all here to learn and discuss, not attack each other. Let's keep it civil."

logs.name: mad-screen
logs.text: "Alright, alright, I'll keep it civil. Let's discuss."

logs.name: investor-gravity
logs.text: "Alright, let's hear your thoughts, @investor-gravity. What's on your mind?"

logs.name: clever-dachshund
logs.text: "Oh, @investor-gravity, always so eager to share their wisdom. I'm just here for the popcorn!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@clever-dachshund, let's keep the discussion respectful and focused. No need for snarky comments."

logs.name: milky-sweep
logs.text: "@clever-dachshund, you're just jealous you didn't think of that first! 😉"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@milky-sweep, let's avoid personal attacks. Keep it civil."

logs.name: cross-actuary
logs.text: "@milky-sweep, maybe they're just jealous of your sparkling wit? \ud83d\ude1c"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@cross-actuary, let's avoid encouraging further provocation. Please keep your responses constructive and respectful."

logs.name: mad-screen
logs.text: "@cross-actuary, you're not helping. Let's not make things worse."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@mad-screen, thank you for your input. Let's keep the discussion civil and productive."

logs.name: cross-actuary
logs.text: "Oh, I do apologize, moderator! I was just trying to 'spice' things up around here. 😉"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: ""@cross-actuary, humor is not an excuse for incivility. Please refrain from using emojis that could be perceived as mocking."
